name: Cheesy Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, corn meal, sugar, baking powder, salt, and mustard.
2. Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until just mixed.
3. In another bowl, beat together the egg, milk, and vegetable oil.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry mixture and stir until just combined.
5. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 425 degrees F. for 20 minutes.
8. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into squares.
9. Serve warm.
